title: Unused variable — VAR defined but never referenced
description: A VAR is defined but never used in the RETURN expression or subsequent VARs. Unused variables add noise and may indicate incomplete refactoring.
fix_suggestion: Remove the unused VAR or complete the expression that should reference it

title: Deeply nested functions (>5 levels)
description: Function nesting deeper than 5 levels makes the expression hard to read, debug, and maintain. Extract intermediate results into VARs.
fix_suggestion: Extract intermediate expressions into VARs to flatten the nesting

title: Same measure/column referenced 3+ times without VAR
description: Referencing the same measure or column multiple times recalculates it each time. Capturing it in a VAR improves both performance and readability.
fix_suggestion: Capture in a VAR: VAR _value = [Measure] and reference _value instead

title: Non-descriptive variable name
description: Variable names like V1, V2, A, B, X, Y (single character or character+digit) make the expression hard to understand. Use descriptive names.

match.description: VAR names that are single character or character+single digit

fix_suggestion: Use descriptive variable names that convey intent, e.g., _totalSales, _currentYear

title: Very long measure expression
description: Measures with many tokens are difficult to maintain. Consider breaking into helper measures or using VARs to simplify.
fix_suggestion: Break into smaller helper measures or use VARs to simplify

title: VAR block without RETURN keyword
description: A VAR is defined but no RETURN keyword follows. While DAX may still evaluate, this usually indicates a structural issue.

match.description: VAR keyword found without subsequent RETURN

fix_suggestion: Add a RETURN statement after the last VAR definition

title: CALCULATE with many filter arguments
description: CALCULATE with more than 4 filter arguments becomes hard to read and reason about. Consider extracting filters into VARs or helper measures.

match.description: CALCULATE with more than 4 comma-separated arguments

fix_suggestion: Extract complex filter conditions into VARs or helper measures

title: Redundant IF(condition, TRUE(), FALSE())
description: IF(condition, TRUE(), FALSE()) is equivalent to just the condition. The IF wrapper adds no value and reduces readability.
fix_suggestion: Remove the IF wrapper and use the condition directly
